instructions: Suno Visual Studio is a visual-first Suno music generation operating app. Reviews must protect the full workflow shape: idea, prompt, lyrics, style, voice/persona, batch generation, song comparison, Song Lab edits, stems, library, cleanup, music-video lane, lipsync QA, and release pack.

rules.rule: Do not collapse the product into a CLI, script, or ComfyUI-only workflow. UI and docs must preserve the visual canvas and Claude Design-style operating model.
Music video must remain a subfeature opened from a selected song/version. It must not become the top-level product or replace the Suno music workflow.
Any Suno/provider capability must be represented in the API coverage map as implemented, planned, blocked, unsupported, or deprecated.
Music-video export must not pass on approximate lip sync. Phoneme, mouth-shape, frame, and segment drift checks must be explicit.
Delete, trash, unlike, archive, unpublish, purge, or cleanup actions must be archive-first where possible and leave receipts/audit state.
Provider API keys and credentials must not be exposed in client code, docs examples, logs, screenshots, or bundles.
